overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing the character Franklin standing on a wooden pier at sunset. The camera slowly orbits counter-clockwise around the stationary character, revealing a suspension bridge and city skyline before panning to show the palm-tree lined shoreline and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier extending into bay facing suspension bridge

agents.ego_description: standing still on the pier, facing the suspension bridge and city skyline with hands at sides

entered.detail: large multi-tower suspension bridge with white suspension cables spanning the bay
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers visible through the haze
weathered wooden planks with concrete pylons extending into the water
yellow safety ladder attached to the edge of the pier
large rectangular concrete boxes with metal fixtures on the pier surface
row of palm trees silhouetted against the sky along the distant shoreline
low-rise beachfront structures visible beyond the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a golden hour view from a wooden pier, facing a massive suspension bridge and distant city skyline. The camera begins a slow leftward pan around the stationary character, with the warm sunset backlighting creating a hazy glow over the water and urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier transitioning from bridge view to shoreline view

events.description: character raises both hands to face, appearing to use a phone or camera to take a photo

agents.ego_description: briefly raises hands to face as if using a phone or camera, then lowers them while continuing to stand on the pier

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the suspension bridge and city skyline rotate out of view, replaced by a closer perspective of the palm-lined shoreline. The character briefly interacts with a phone or camera around the 22-second mark. The lighting shifts from backlit to more diffused as the camera turns away from the sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier facing shoreline and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the shoreline scenery with distant mountains visible on the horizon

entered.detail: hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the coastal buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the pier facing the shoreline with palm trees and low-rise buildings now prominent in the view. A distant mountain range becomes visible on the horizon as the camera completes its leftward pan, with the character remaining stationary and observing the tranquil coastal environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous counter-clockwise orbit around a stationary character, transitioning from a backlit urban vista to a tranquil coastal landscape. It begins on a wooden pier facing a massive suspension bridge and a distant city skyline, with the warm golden hour sun creating a hazy glow over the water. As the camera pans left, the urban skyline rotates out of view and the lighting shifts from a direct backlight to a more diffused glow, revealing a closer perspective of the palm-lined shoreline. The scene then expands to show low-rise buildings and lush greenery along the coast before finally settling on a view of a distant mountain range on the horizon.
